com.dua3.utility.lang.LangUtil.CachingSupplier

Package
Description
com.dua3.utility.lang
This package provides some general utility classes.

  • Uses of LangUtil.CachingSupplier in com.dua3.utility.lang

    Classes in com.dua3.utility.lang that implement LangUtil.CachingSupplier
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    LangUtil.AutoClosableCachingSupplier<T extends @Nullable Object>
    A supplier implementation that extends CachingSupplier and implements the AutoCloseableSupplier interface.
    static class 
    LangUtil.StrongCachingSupplier<T extends @Nullable Object>
    A supplier implementation that caches the result of a computation upon the first retrieval.
    static final class 
    LangUtil.WeakCachingSupplier<T>
    A supplier implementation that caches the result of a computation upon the first retrieval.
    Methods in com.dua3.utility.lang that return LangUtil.CachingSupplier
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> LangUtil.CachingSupplier<T>
    LangUtil.cache(Supplier<T> supplier, boolean strong)
    Creates a cached supplier based on the provided supplier and caching strategy.
